title: Entity Pickup Items Behavior
description: Allows the mob to pick up items on the ground.

pickup_same_items_as_in_hand.title: Pickup Same Items As In Hand
pickup_same_items_as_in_hand.description:
If true, the mob will only pick up items that match what it is already holding.

Sample values:
• allay: true

can_pickup_any_item.title: Can Pickup Any Item
can_pickup_any_item.description:
If true, the mob can pick up any item

Sample values:
• bogged: true

can_pickup_to_hand_or_equipment.title: Can Pickup To Hand Or Equipment
can_pickup_to_hand_or_equipment.description: If true, the mob can pick up items to its hand or armor slots

cooldown_after_being_attacked.title: Cooldown After Being Attacked
cooldown_after_being_attacked.description: Time in seconds the mob cannot pickup items after being attacked

excluded_items.title: Excluded Items
excluded_items.description:
List of items this mob will not pick up

Sample values:
• bogged: [{"tags":"q.all_tags('minecraft:is_spear')"}]

goal_radius.title: Goal Radius
goal_radius.description:
Distance in blocks within the mob considers it has reached the goal. This is the "wiggle room" to stop the AI from bouncing back and forth trying to reach a specific spot

Sample values:
• allay: 2.2
• bogged: 2

max_dist.title: Max Dist
max_dist.description:
Maximum distance this mob will look for items to pick up

Sample values:
• allay: 32
• bogged: 3

on_pickup_item_end.title: Pickup Item End
on_pickup_item_end.description: Event to run when this mob either finishes or loses interest in picking up an item

defaultSnippets.label: Entity ActorDefinitionTrigger
defaultSnippets.description: Triggers an entity event when specified conditions are met. Events activate component groups that change entity behavior—transforming villagers into zombie villagers, switching mobs to aggressive mode, or triggering growth stages. Combine with filters to create conditional state machines that respond to gameplay.

on_pickup_item_start.title: Pickup Item Start
on_pickup_item_start.description: Event to run when this mob moves to pick up an item

defaultSnippets.label: Entity ActorDefinitionTrigger
defaultSnippets.description: Triggers an entity event when specified conditions are met. Events activate component groups that change entity behavior—transforming villagers into zombie villagers, switching mobs to aggressive mode, or triggering growth stages. Combine with filters to create conditional state machines that respond to gameplay.

pickup_based_on_chance.title: Pickup Based On Chance
pickup_based_on_chance.description:
If true, depending on the difficulty, there is a random chance that the mob may not be able to pickup items

Sample values:
• bogged: true

priority.title: Priority
priority.description:
As priority approaches 0, the priority is increased. The higher the priority, the sooner this behavior will be executed as a goal.

Sample values:
• allay: 2
• bogged: 5
• parched: 6

search_height.title: Search Height
search_height.description:
Height in blocks the mob will search for items

Sample values:
• allay: 32

speed_multiplier.title: Speed Multiplier
speed_multiplier.description:
Movement speed multiplier of the mob when using this AI Goal

Sample values:
• allay: 6
• bogged: 1

track_target.title: Track Target
track_target.description: If true, this mob will chase after the target as long as it's a valid target
